name: legalcode-pro-codex
description: Legalcode Pro for Codex with Pro MCP access, 12 legal skills (incl. Icelandic gold-plating analysis), and CLI install helper.

interface.shortDescription: Pro legal research, drafting skills, and CLI for Codex
interface.longDescription: Bundle the hosted Legalcode Pro MCP endpoint with 12 Legalcode skills (including Icelandic gold-plating analysis and a self-contained DOCX renderer) and CLI install helper for stronger search, guidance, agreements, downloads, and authenticated workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Legalcode to review this contract and identify the main legal risks.
Use Legalcode to analyze the governing statute and explain the compliance implications.
